# clickstack_sources (Data Source)

Lists all ClickStack data sources.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "clickstack_sources" "all" {}

output "source_ids" {
  value = data.clickstack_sources.all.sources[*].id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `sources` (Attributes List) List of data sources. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sources))

<a id="nestedatt--sources"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sources`

Read-Only:

- `body_expression` (String) Expression for body content.
- `connection` (String) Connection string.
- `displayed_timestamp_value_expression` (String) Expression for displayed timestamp.
- `event_attributes_expression` (String) Expression for event attributes.
- `from` (Attributes) Source table reference. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--sources--from))
- `id` (String) Source identifier.
- `implicit_column_expression` (String) Expression for implicit column.
- `kind` (String) Source kind (e.g., log, trace, metric).
- `metric_source_id` (String) Related metric source ID.
- `name` (String) Source name.
- `resource_attributes_expression` (String) Expression for resource attributes.
- `service_name_expression` (String) Expression for service name.
- `severity_text_expression` (String) Expression for severity text.
- `span_id_expression` (String) Expression for span ID.
- `timestamp_value_expression` (String) Expression for timestamp values.
- `trace_id_expression` (String) Expression for trace ID.
- `trace_source_id` (String) Related trace source ID.

<a id="nestedatt--sources--from"></a>
### Nested Schema for `sources.from`

Read-Only:

- `database_name` (String) Database name.
- `table_name` (String) Table name.
